analysis: The translation is high-quality and maintains the author's direct, authoritative technical tone. It correctly handles complex MDX structures and preserves all code-adjacent nuances. The Japanese flow is natural, using appropriate terminology like 'ハルシネーション' (hallucination) and '人間介入ループ' (human-in-the-loop) that resonates with the local AI engineering community.
strengths: Excellent preservation of technical terminology and framework-specific nuances (e.g., RSC limitations, MCP security model).
Natural localization of idiomatic technical prose without losing the 'Dan Levy' voice.
Perfect maintenance of MDX frontmatter and structural integrity.

issues.note: Minor typo in a section heading.
One paragraph was duplicated in the CopilotKit section.
issues.excerpt: CopilotKit はエージェントネイティブなフロントエンドアプリケーション向けに最も包括的なフレームワークです。
